init_hook: echo '🔬 RareSight — AI for Early Rare Disease Detection'
echo '  devbox run setup          # Install all dependencies'
echo '  devbox run prepare       # Prepare directories'
echo '  devbox run train         # Full training pipeline'
echo '  devbox run app           # Start API + Frontend'

scripts.setup: echo '📦 Installing dependencies...' && poetry install && echo '✅ Setup complete!'
scripts.prepare: echo '📁 Preparing directories...' && mkdir -p data/raw data/processed checkpoints logs outputs && echo '✅ Directories ready'
scripts.train-s1: echo '🚀 Stage 1: MAE Pre-training' && poetry run python scripts/train_stage1_pretrain.py
scripts.train-s2: echo '🚀 Stage 2: Supervised Fine-tuning' && poetry run python scripts/train_stage2_finetune.py
scripts.train-s3: echo '🚀 Stage 3: Multimodal Transfer Learning' && poetry run python scripts/train_stage3_multimodal.py
scripts.train: devbox run train-s1 && devbox run train-s2
scripts.train-all: devbox run train-s1 && devbox run train-s2 && devbox run train-s3
scripts.evaluate: echo '📊 Evaluating model...' && poetry run python scripts/evaluate.py
scripts.api: echo '🚀 Starting API on http://localhost:8000' && poetry run uvicorn api.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.frontend: echo '🎨 Starting Frontend on http://localhost:8501' && poetry run streamlit run frontend/app.py --server.port 8501
scripts.app: echo 'Use two terminals: devbox run api && devbox run frontend'
scripts.lint: poetry run ruff check src/ scripts/ api/ && poetry run mypy src/
scripts.format: poetry run ruff format src/ scripts/ api/
